zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse於1303年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內a隆-素-馬內時，他的父親Hugues de Chatillon23歲，母親Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu18歲。他與Marie de Clacy結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1336年8月17日在法國享年33歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內庫易利-朋吉奧-達斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse于1303年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內a隆-素-馬內时，他的父亲Hugues de Chatillon23岁，母亲Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu18岁。他与Marie de Clacy结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1336年8月17日在法国享年33岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內庫易利-朋吉奧-達斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse was born in 1303, in Châlons-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Hugues de Chatillon, was 23 and his mother, Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu, was 18. He married Marie de Clacy. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 17 August 1336, in France, at the age of 33, and was buried in Couilly-Pont-aux-Dames, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse est né en 1303, à Châlons-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Hugues de Chatillon, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Marie de Clacy. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 août 1336, à France, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Couilly-Pont-aux-Dames, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse 1303 in Châlons-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues de Chatillon 23 und seine Mutter Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu 18. Er hat Marie de Clacy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. August 1336 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Frankreich und wurde in Couilly-Pont-aux-Dames, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse è nato il nel 1303 nel Châlons-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues de Chatillon, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Marie de Clacy. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 agosto 1336, nel Francia, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Couilly-Pont-aux-Dames, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuseが1303年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンチaロンス-スル-マルンで生まれた時，父Hugues de Chatillonは23歳，母Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheuは18歳であった。Marie de Clacyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1336年8月17日にフランスで33歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンコウイリ-プオント-アウクス-ダムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse(이)가 1303년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 cha론스-수-마니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues de Chatillon(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Marie de Clacy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1336년 8월 17일 프랑스에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-트-마니 코우이리-폰트-오스-다메스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse nasceu em 1303, em Châlons-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Hugues de Chatillon, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie de Clacy. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1336, em França, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Couilly-Pont-aux-Dames, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse родился в 1303 г. в местности чaлонс-сур-марн, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues de Chatillon было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie de Clacy. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 августа 1336 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности коуилли-понт-аукс-дэмесь, сине-ет-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues II de Châtillon Lord of Leuse nació en 1303, en Châlons-sur-Marne, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Hugues de Chatillon, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Marie de Clacy. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1336, en Francia, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Couilly-Pont-aux-Dames, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia.
